---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to Weather Signal
title: "feature: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What workflow or forecasting need should this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the command, MCP tool, output field, or documentation change.

## Alternatives

What can users do today, and why is it insufficient?

## Notes

Do not include API keys, private endpoint URLs, customer locations, or business
demand data.
